resultList.dtldesc: Own a well-connected residential apartment in the established locality of Malakpet, Hyderabad, offering comfort, convenience, and strong city connectivity. This ready-to-move 2 BHK flat is ideal for families, working professionals, or investors seeking a spacious home in a developed residential neighbourhood with easy access to schools, hospitals, shopping centres, and public transportation.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 3rd floor of a five-storey residential building, this semi-furnished apartment offers a super built-up area of 1130 sq. ft. The flat includes two bedrooms and two bathrooms, providing a comfortable layout for modern family living. Both bedrooms are fitted with built-in wardrobes, ensuring practical storage solutions and efficient space utilisation.The apartment features elegant marble flooring throughout, creating a clean and timeless interior appearance. A spacious balcony is connected to both the living room and kitchen, allowing natural light and ventilation across the home. The living area includes stylish wooden and glass display units suitable for books and decorative items.The kitchen is designed with a granite platform and storage cabinets in a functional layout. The residence also includes a dedicated puja room, adding additional utility for family living. The apartment is east facing and vastu compliant, making it a preferred option among homebuyers seeking positive orientation and natural sunlight.Both bathrooms are well planned, with one attached to the master bedroom and another serving as a common washroom. One bathroom follows a western layout while the other is designed in Indian style. Essential fittings, lights, and fans are already installed within the property.FacilitiesThe apartment includes covered parking along with security arrangements such as CCTV surveillance and on-site security personnel for resident safety. The building enjoys good accessibility from the main road and offers a peaceful residential environment within a developed urban locality.The semi-furnished condition allows buyers the flexibility to further customise interiors according to personal preferences while benefiting from essential fittings already in place.LocalityLocated in Malakpet, Hyderabad, the property enjoys proximity to reputed educational institutions including St. Josephs School and Saraswathi Vidya Mandir. Healthcare facilities such as Yashoda Hospitals and Safe Childrens Hospital are easily accessible from the apartment.Shopping and entertainment options including PVR Next Galleria Mall are located nearby. The apartment is situated directly opposite the ITEK Nucleus campus and benefits from excellent public transport connectivity. The main road is approximately 50 metres away, while the nearest bus stop is around 100 metres from the property. Connectivity is further enhanced by nearby Moosarambagh Metro Station and Malakpet MMTS Station, ensuring smooth travel across Hyderabad.
